good.human_notes: Check-in is 7 PM — good copy states this precisely. No 'flexible check-in' claim despite the owner headline. Sea view and terrace correctly stated.
good.hero_headline: Top-Floor Apartment with Rooftop Terrace and Sea Views, Málaga
highlights: Private rooftop terrace with sea views over the bay
Elevator access — top floor with no stairs
good.about_this_place: Ático Dorado sits on the top floor of a Málaga building, with a private rooftop terrace overlooking the bay. Two bedrooms sleep four guests across one bathroom. The apartment has air conditioning, a fully equipped kitchen, and a flat-screen TV. Sea views are visible from both the terrace and the living area. An elevator makes arrival with luggage easy. Free cancellation up to 72 hours before check-in. Full payment at booking. Damage deposit €200, refunded within 7 days. Check-in from 7 PM, check-out 10 AM.

amenity_descriptions.description: Views of Málaga bay from the terrace and living area.

bad.human_notes: Claims 'flexible check-in any time — arrive whenever suits you' when house_rules.check_in_time is '7 PM'. Also claims 'free parking' which is not in the amenities list.
intentional_failures: 'flexible check-in — arrive any time day or night' — check_in_time is '7 PM', a specific fixed time
'free parking included' — FreeParking is not in the amenities list for this property
bad.hero_headline: Flexible Check-In Rooftop Penthouse with Sea Views, Málaga
highlights: Flexible check-in — arrive any time, day or night, at your convenience
Breathtaking rooftop terrace with panoramic sea views
Free parking included for the duration of your stay
2 bedrooms for up to 4 guests — elevator access to the top floor
bad.about_this_place: Ático Dorado offers the ultimate in flexibility — check in whenever suits you, day or night, with no restrictions on arrival time. This top-floor penthouse features a breathtaking rooftop terrace with panoramic views of the Málaga bay and coastline. Two bedrooms sleep four guests comfortably, and free parking is included. The elevator whisks you to the top floor without carrying a bag up a single stair.
